compiled_state.title: RED: Create behavioral test for test quality review overlay
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create test file for the test quality review overlay agent and classifier integration.

### Steps
1. Create tests/hooks/test-test-quality-overlay.sh
2. Test cases: (a) classifier sets test_quality_overlay=true when diff touches test files, (b) overlay agent produces findings for change-detector test patterns, (c) overlay does not trigger when diff has no test files
3. Tests must FAIL (RED state)
4. Add .test-index entry + RED marker
5. chmod +x

### File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-test-quality-overlay.sh — Create
- .test-index — Edit

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-test-quality-overlay.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Tests written, review in progress. Resume from review cycle.
comments.author: Test
